summary: Replace with mechanism-run validation outcome before mutation starts.

checks.detail: Confirm exactly one primary mechanism target is in scope and supporting targets stay minimal.
Declare baseline eval, lint, and mechanism assessment artifact paths in the run plan.
Declare candidate eval, lint, mechanism assessment, changed-files manifest, behavior-delta, and promotion report paths before mutation.
Freeze the focused test files or test command that will justify non-regression claims.
Record how signoff and append-only system-log recording will happen after promotion evaluation.

next_action: Freeze scope, declare focused test files, and map baseline/candidate artifact paths before mutation.
